'''Shana''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Emberlene]] and one of two [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]] warrior-women who served as escorts for [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] when she was acting as a [[Smugglers' Alliance]] representative in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. Her [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was destroyed by the [[Death Star prototype]] in the [[Battle of the Maw]] Installation.

==Appearances==
*''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}}
